interactions.raw_notes: Maya saw Erik Bernhardsson keynote on serverless GPU. Solid technical depth — referenced internal Spotify ML infra anecdotes. Booth had a live demo running stable-diffusion fine-tunes. Logged follow-up.

interactions.subject: Re: intro from Olof Mathe
interactions.raw_notes: Erik responded to Olof's intro. Open to a chat but said they aren't raising — Series A still has runway. Suggested staying in touch for a future B.

30min coffee in NYC. Erik described the H100 pricing strategy, ARR trending past $15M, mostly bottoms-up. Renegade pressed on competitive moat vs Replicate/Baseten — Erik's answer: developer love + cold-start latency. Devon noted thesis fit (workflow-critical AI infra) but valuation guidance ($800M-$1B) likely above Renegade range.

interactions.author: maya@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: H100 pricing announcement is moving the needle — net-new sign-ups up sharply per Erik's last email. Series B rumored for H2 2026 at $1B+. Putting on the active watchlist; would want to pre-empt at a smaller round size if possible.
